backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, Message, TherapySessionData, etc.) and state maps for a mental health platform with authorization mixins, inbox messaging, mood tracking, and therapy session management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features—a CrisisSupportModal component and keyword-based crisis detection logic—to their respective source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key details of every component, section, and primitive in the MindVault UI.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the MindVault app with SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter Card metadata, JSON-LD structured data, and the React root mount point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component wrapping the app in ErrorBoundary, Suspense, and LocalAuthProvider, rendering MindVaultLandingPage with a Sonner Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/auth/localAuthCrypto.ts: Cryptographic utilities using the Web Crypto API for PBKDF2-based password hashing, salt generation, verifier derivation, and AES-GCM encryption key derivation.
frontend/src/auth/localAuthStore.ts: IndexedDB-backed store class managing local user accounts and session persistence, with methods to save, retrieve, and clear accounts and sessions.
frontend/src/components/auth/LocalAuthSc: Renders a sign-in/sign-up form with username, password, and a CAPTCHA check, using the useLocalAuth hook to authenticate users locally.
frontend/src/components/auth/LocalCaptch: Displays a simple math-based CAPTCHA challenge (addition of two random numbers) and notifies the parent component whether the user's answer is correct.
frontend/src/components/experience/Anony: Implements an end-to-end encrypted anonymous chat that decrypts incoming messages, classifies mood/burnout, detects crisis keywords, and shows therapist prompt or crisis support modals as needed.
frontend/src/components/experience/Crisi: An accessible modal dialog that displays crisis support messaging, a free therapist session offer, and a hotline phone number when crisis keywords are detected.
frontend/src/components/experience/DataE: Provides a form for submitting key-value journal entries, classifies their mood, fetches backend templates, shows a mood insight callout, and triggers a crisis modal if crisis keywords are detected.
frontend/src/components/experience/Exper: Acts as an authentication gate that lets users choose between Internet Identity or local username/password login before accessing the main experience.
A simple layout wrapper that applies a glass-card style and zoom transition animation around experience page content.
Main authenticated experience page that renders tabs for the user experience, therapist inbox, and statistics, handling local auth and Internet Identity login/logout and admin role checks.
frontend/src/components/experience/Inbox: UI control bar for filtering and sorting therapist inbox messages by client, read/unread status, and date order, with a clear-filters action.
Displays a threaded conversation of inbox messages with sender/timestamp info, read/unread badges, mark-as-read functionality, and an inline reply form toggle.
Form component for therapists to compose and send a reply to a client message thread, with character limit validation and submission via the respondToMessage mutation.
frontend/src/components/experience/MoodI: Alert callout that displays a detected mood category (anxiety, depression, stress, positive, neutral) with a matching icon, color scheme, and reassurance message.
frontend/src/components/experience/Sessi: Form for submitting a therapist session request, showing the detected mood category and accepting a user message that is sent via the requestSession mutation.
frontend/src/components/experience/Thera: Displays a scrollable list of all session requests submitted to a therapist, showing category badges, timestamps, and truncated user principal IDs. Handles loading, error, and empty states.

A tabbed inbox view for therapists showing messages, notifications, and session notes with filtering by client, read status, and sort order. Uses memoized filtering/grouping logic and displays unread counts on tabs.

A dialog modal that prompts users to connect with a licensed therapist after mood analysis, offering a free first session. Transitions between a promotional prompt and a SessionRequestForm on confirmation.

Displays client statistics for therapists with time-period filtering (week, month, all) using data from client summaries. Includes a note that full time-based filtering requires per-session timestamps not yet available from the backend.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer with contact email, smooth-scroll quick links to page sections, and social media icons for X, LinkedIn, and GitHub. Displays the current year dynamically.
frontend/src/components/motion/ZoomInVie: A wrapper component that applies a CSS zoom-in animation when the element scrolls into view, using an IntersectionObserver hook. Respects the user's reduced-motion preference by skipping the animation.
frontend/src/components/motion/ZoomPageT: Handles animated page-level transitions between a landing view and an experience view using zoom/fade effects, with reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/motion/ZoomTrans: A wrapper component that animates its children into view with a zoom-in and fade effect after an optional delay, respecting reduced-motion preferences.
frontend/src/components/navigation/GoBac: A ghost button with an arrow icon that navigates back using a provided callback or the browser history API.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Butto: A reusable button primitive with primary/secondary variants, multiple sizes, zoom transition styles, and optional Radix Slot rendering.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Callo: A styled callout/blockquote component with a quote icon and accent left border for highlighting key statements.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Conve: Renders a two-bubble chat preview (user and AI messages) with an optional entrance animation and reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Glass: A forwarded-ref div with glassmorphism styling that scales slightly on hover/focus and applies a zoom transition.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Progr: Displays a step progress bar as a row of pill-shaped indicators, highlighting the current and completed steps with accessible ARIA attributes.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Secti: A semantic section wrapper with optional eyebrow, title, and description header, centered content, and max-width constraints.
frontend/src/components/sections/AboutSe: Renders a grid of six feature cards (privacy, safety, encryption, etc.) with staggered scroll-triggered fade-in animations for the About MindVault section.
frontend/src/components/sections/CoreEmo: A scroll-triggered section displaying a central emotional headline and supporting copy about MindVault's non-judgmental approach.
frontend/src/components/sections/Corpora: An editorial section explaining corporate burnout and the importance of anonymity, featuring a highlighted callout statistic and scroll-triggered animation.
frontend/src/components/sections/FAQSect: Renders a collapsible accordion FAQ section with six questions about MindVault's anonymity, pricing, and security, with scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/sections/Feature: Renders a responsive 3-column grid of six feature cards (privacy, encryption, AI, availability, therapists, care) with scroll-triggered fade-in animations and reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/sections/FinalCT: Displays the final call-to-action section with a headline and two buttons ('Start MindVault' and 'Subscription plans'), featuring a pulsing radial gradient background and scroll-triggered fade-in.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: Full-screen hero section with the MindVault title, tagline, and action buttons, featuring a scroll-opacity-fading background image, animated gradient, neural particles overlay, and reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/sections/HowItWo: Three-step 'How It Works' section with animated step list and a conversation preview panel, using scroll-triggered slide-in animations and a progress indicator.
frontend/src/components/sections/Privacy: Two-column privacy section listing four security commitments with icons and a trust badge image, with scroll-triggered slide-in animations on both columns.
frontend/src/components/system/AccessDen: Displays an access-denied error screen with a shield icon, descriptive message, and an optional 'Go Back' button for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/system/ErrorBoun: React class-based error boundary that catches render errors and shows a fallback UI with a retry button instead of crashing the app.
frontend/src/components/visual/NeuralPar: Canvas-based animated overlay that renders floating particles with glowing cyan dots and purple connection lines forming a neural-network visual effect, skipped when reduced motion is preferred.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) actors, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDirectionalScrollO: React hook that returns a scroll-position-based opacity value for a referenced element, fading out on scroll down and in on scroll up, with reduced-motion support and RAF-throttled updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalAuth.tsx: React context and hook for local (non-ICP) username/password authentication, handling sign-up, sign-in, sign-out, session persistence, password validation, and an in-memory encryption key.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for messages, encrypted messages, data entries, admin inbox, notifications, mood tracking, and session management.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollMappedOpacit: React hook that maps window scroll position to an opacity value between 0 and 1 over a configurable distance, with reduced-motion support and RAF throttling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for light and dark themes (including crisis modal colors), and keyframe animations for modal entrances.
frontend/src/lib/classifier/moodBurnoutR: Provides keyword-based classification functions to determine mood category (anxiety, depression, stress, positive, neutral) and burnout risk level from free text, numeric ratings, or key/value entries.
frontend/src/lib/crisisDetection.ts: Exports a single function that scans text for a predefined list of crisis/suicidal keywords and returns a boolean indicating whether any were found.
frontend/src/lib/crypto/e2ee.ts: Implements AES-GCM end-to-end encryption helpers for encrypting and decrypting messages with a CryptoKey, plus serialization/deserialization utilities for the EncryptedMessage format.
frontend/src/lib/inboxFilters.ts: Provides utility functions to filter inbox messages by client principal or read status, sort them by date, and group them into threads by threadId.
frontend/src/lib/moodInsight.ts: Generates a MoodInsight object containing a category label and reassurance message by selecting from provided templates or falling back to preset defaults for a given MoodCategory.
frontend/src/lib/moodPresets.ts: Defines client-side fallback reassurance message templates keyed by MoodCategory, along with helpers to pick a random template or retrieve a fallback for a given category.
frontend/src/lib/motion.ts: Defines shared animation constants (durations, easing curves) and helper functions for generating CSS transition strings and zoom-entry styles, including reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/lib/security/passwordPolicy: Validates password complexity against length, character class, and common-pattern rules, and checks whether a password rotation is required based on a 90-day policy.
frontend/src/lib/useInView.ts: A React hook that uses IntersectionObserver to detect when an element enters the viewport, immediately resolving to in-view if the user prefers reduced motion.
frontend/src/lib/usePrefersReducedMotion: A React hook that listens to the prefers-reduced-motion media query and returns a boolean reflecting the user's current preference.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
Top-level page component that manages navigation between the landing, experience, and subscription-plans views, rendering each section of the landing page with zoom-in scroll animations.
frontend/src/pages/SubscriptionPlansPage: Renders a subscription plans page with three pricing tiers (Single Session, Monthly, Quarterly) displayed as glass cards, including a free-first-session alert and a go-back navigation button.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom color tokens (including crisis and popup-glow variants), border radii, fonts, box shadows, and keyframe animations for modals and accordions.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state, existing features, and pending feature requests for a therapist inbox app, specifically documenting the crisis support modal and keyword-detection features for suicidal ideation phrases.
